mapper.select:
SELECT s.song_id AS song_id, s.title AS title, ar.name AS artist_name, al.title AS album_title, NVL(LISTAGG(g.name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY g.name), '장르없음') AS genre_name, MIN(g.genre_id) AS genre_id, al.cover_image_url AS cover_image_url, NVL(pl.play_count, 0) AS play_count, NVL(sl.like_count, 0) AS like_count
FROM songs_tbl s
JOIN artists_tbl ar ON s.artist_id = ar.artist_id
JOIN albums_tbl al ON s.album_id = al.album_id
LEFT JOIN song_genre_tbl sg ON s.song_id = sg.song_id
LEFT JOIN genres_tbl g ON sg.genre_id = g.genre_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS play_count FROM play_log_tbl WHERE played_at >= SYSDATE - 7 GROUP BY song_id ) pl ON s.song_id = pl.song_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM song_likes_tbl GROUP BY song_id ) sl ON s.song_id = sl.song_id
GROUP BY s.song_id, s.title, ar.name, al.title, al.cover_image_url, pl.play_count, sl.like_count
ORDER BY NVL(pl.play_count, 0) DESC
